## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Configure '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Send message / click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / screenshots

If applicable, add logs (e.g. with `DEBUG=app:*`) or screenshots to help explain the problem.

```
paste relevant log output here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.x]

- Messenger provider(s): [e.g. Discord, Slack, Mattermost]
- LLM provider(s): [e.g. OpenAI, Flowise, Ollama]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
